wta_1||What is the name of the winner wh.question: What is the name of the winner who has won the most matches, and how many rank points does this player have?
wta_1||What is the name of the winner wh.gold: SELECT winner_name ,  winner_rank_points FROM matches GROUP BY winner_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
samples: SELECT winner_name, ranking_points FROM players JOIN (SELECT winner_id, COUNT(*) AS match_wins FROM matches GROUP BY winner_id ORDER BY match_wins DESC LIMIT 1) AS wins ON players.player_id = wins.winner_id JOIN rankings ON players.player_id = rankings.player_id ORDER BY ranking_date DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT winner_name, ranking_points FROM players JOIN (SELECT winner_id, COUNT(*) AS match_count FROM matches GROUP BY winner_id ORDER BY match_count DESC LIMIT 1) AS most_wins ON players.player_id = most_wins.winner_id JOIN rankings ON players.player_id = rankings.player_id ORDER BY ranking_date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT winner_name, SUM(ranking_points) AS total_rank_points FROM matches JOIN rankings ON matches.winner_id = rankings.player_id GROUP BY winner_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT winner_name, MAX(rankings.ranking_points) FROM matches JOIN rankings ON matches.winner_id = rankings.player_id GROUP BY winner_id ORDER BY COUNT(match_num) DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT winner_name, ranking_points FROM players INNER JOIN (SELECT winner_id, COUNT(*) AS match_count FROM matches GROUP BY winner_id ORDER BY match_count DESC LIMIT 1) AS most_wins ON players.player_id = most_wins.winner_id INNER JOIN rankings ON players.player_id = rankings.player_id ORDER BY ranking_date DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT winner_name, ranking_points FROM players JOIN (SELECT winner_id, COUNT(*) AS match_count FROM matches GROUP BY winner_id ORDER BY match_count DESC LIMIT 1) AS most_wins ON players.player_id = most_wins.winner_id JOIN rankings ON players.player_id = rankings.player_id ORDER BY ranking_date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT winner_name, SUM(ranking_points) AS total_rank_points FROM matches JOIN rankings ON matches.winner_id = rankings.player_id GROUP BY winner_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT winner_name, ranking_points FROM players JOIN (SELECT winner_id, COUNT(*) as match_count FROM matches GROUP BY winner_id ORDER BY match_count DESC LIMIT 1) as winning_player ON players.player_id = winning_player.winner_id JOIN rankings ON players.player_id = rankings.player_id ORDER BY ranking_date DESC LIMIT 1;
